MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-04-432881 WITH CASE CGC-04-435617
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew M. Zacks, Esq., Law Offices of Andrew M. Zacks (415) 956-8100 for Defendant Lau
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Defendant Lau is no longer a party to this action. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF WAI CHAN 1) MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-04-432881 WITH CASE CGC-04-435617; AND 2) REQUEST TO AMEND COMPLAINT:
1) Motion To Consolidate is GRANTED for all purposes; #432881 is the lead case and all future pleadings shall be filed in #432881. 2) Request To Amend is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Slapp) By Defts
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James B. Kraus, Law office of Andrew Zacks (415)956-8100 for defendant and moving party: Henry Lau and Siu Poon

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT HENRY LAU AND SIU POON'S Special Motion To Strike (Slapp): GRANTED; 4th and 6th Causes of Action are protected activities involved and Chan fails to show probability of prevailing on merits because there is no contract as held by Judge Ballati and no showing of malice for malicious prosecution. ORDER SIGNED. (301/AJR/AC) Reporter: Joyce Long CSR #8620
